name: 濒死免疫
description: 飞段处于「濒死」状态时，免疫所有伤害
skillCode: var hidan = context.rulePiece; if (context.piece.instanceId !== hidan.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var inDying = hidan.statusTags && hidan.statusTags.some(function(t) { return t.type === 'hidan-dying'; }); if (!inDying) return { success: false, message: '' }; return { success: true, blocked: true, message: hidan.name + '处于濒死状态，免疫伤害' };
